violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets have been ordered, PIC awaiting delivery. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. List of Food Safety consultants was provided. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

Multiple chemical spray bottles were observed hanging on the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Bottles were removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026

Per interview of staff, beverage utensils are only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as meats and cheeses must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026

Eggs were observed held at 74 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
Cases of beverages were observed stored on the floor in the service area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils were brought to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
Dry ingredients were being stored in non-human-grade food containers. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Sponges and scrubs were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

Some packaged grab and go items in the food establishment are lacking the complete information on labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including sub ingredients), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
Single service items and container of pastries were observed stored in the food prep sink. PIC informed to remove. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

Cook in kitchen was observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
